task_prompt: I want to go deeper with Kelet — add more signals and get better coverage
app_description: FastAPI + pydantic-ai. Already has kelet.configure() and agentic_session() wired. No React frontend — server-only. Developer explicitly wants full mode: more signals, better failure coverage.
key_findings: Integration was already at a strong baseline — 7 signals across 3 files before eval
Two gaps identified: missing kelet.agent() span naming and no topic-refusal signal
No API key changes needed — K8s Secret + ConfigMap pattern already correct
Session boundary semantics clean — UUID per conversation with correct TTL expiry signaling
Synthetics cover all 5 failure categories from phase 0b workflow mapping
Single file changed (src/routers/chat.py) — minimal, targeted additions
correctness_notes: agent-topic-refusal uses run.result.output inspection post-stream — correct placement outside agentic_session context to avoid session context issues
kelet.agent() wrapper placed inside agentic_session and outside chat_agent.iter() — correct nesting
refusal detection uses case-insensitive 'does not cover' matching the exact system prompt refusal phrase
